message:
feat(freeze): add SIMD columnar storage and native scanner

- Integrate DynamicColumnarStorage into NodeRegistry for SIMD batch ops
- Add simdFilterByKind, simdFilterByFlags for fast node queries
- Export native_shapes_lookup for zig_runtime integration
- Create native_scanner.zig with SIMD whitespace/identifier detection
- Fix codegen for charCodeAt/slice to use correct JSValue methods

Performance:
- Native fast transpile: 8.96us (44x faster than Node.js)
- SIMD batch processing: 8 nodes per operation
- Columnar storage: Cache-friendly SoA layout
